iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: Standard blade. Keeps an edge longer than most.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: Splinters under pressure. Better than nothing.

staff_of_ash.name: Staff of Ash
staff_of_ash.description: Carved from a tree that burned but did not fall.

broken_dagger.name: Broken Dagger
broken_dagger.description: Half a blade. Still sharp enough.

ember_flask.name: Ember Flask
ember_flask.description: Warm light in a glass prison. Restores vitals at a bonfire.

soul_fragment.name: Soul Fragment
soul_fragment.description: A shard of someone else's purpose.

iron_shard.name: Iron Shard
iron_shard.description: Broken off something that once mattered.

hollow_core.name: Hollow Core
hollow_core.description: The last thing inside a hollow knight. It hums faintly.

iron_key.name: Iron Key
iron_key.description: Heavy. Cold. It fits one lock in this world.

sentinel_ash.name: Sentinel Ash
sentinel_ash.description: Grey dust that was once conviction.

blinded_crown.name: Blinded Crown
blinded_crown.description: It weighs more than it should. The eyeholes have been filled with wax.

cursed_blade.name: Cursed Blade
cursed_blade.description: It cuts beautifully. It also cuts you.
